mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update Maven Wrapper version from 3.1.0 to 3.2.0 and rename internal variables to match the new version's script structure.
Add SHA-256 checksum validation for the downloaded Maven Wrapper JAR to ensure integrity and security.
mvnw.cmd.after:
IF NOT %WRAPPER_SHA_256_SUM%=="" (
    powershell -Command "&{"
       "$hash = (Get-FileHash \"%WRAPPER_JAR%\" -Algorithm SHA256).Hash.ToLower();"
       "If('%WRAPPER_SHA_256_SUM%' -ne $hash){"
       "  Write-Output 'Error: Failed to validate Maven wrapper SHA-256, your Maven wrapper might be compromised.';"
       "  Write-Output 'Investigate or delete %WRAPPER_JAR% to attempt a clean download.';"
       "  Write-Output 'If you updated your Maven version, you need to update the specified wrapperSha256Sum property.';"
       "  exit 1;"
       "}"
       "}"
    if ERRORLEVEL 1 goto error
)

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.2.0, replacing the old 3.1.0 logic with the new standard implementation.
mvnw.after: # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0

mvnw.general_idea: Modernize shell syntax by replacing backtick command substitution with $() for better readability and nesting support.
Remove legacy M2_HOME environment variable support which is no longer used in modern Maven versions.
Update the default Maven Wrapper JAR download URL from version 3.1.0 to 3.2.0.
Add SHA-256 checksum validation for the downloaded Maven Wrapper JAR to ensure integrity and security.
Improve Windows compatibility by handling CRLF line endings in property files and adding quiet flags to download tools.
mvnw.before: while IFS="=" read key value; do
mvnw.after: while IFS="=" read -r key value; do

mvnw.general_idea: Refactor logging to use a dedicated log function and respect MVNW_VERBOSE flag consistently.
Update the Java class used to launch the wrapper from the old Plexus classworlds to the new Maven Wrapper Main class.
Remove the deprecated -Dmaven.home system property from the Java execution command.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace MongoDB starter with JPA starter to switch persistence layer from NoSQL to SQL.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application logic has changed to use relational databases; keeping MongoDB would result in unused dependencies and missing JPA classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace AMQP starter with Actuator starter to switch from message queue integration to application monitoring.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application no longer uses RabbitMQ/AMQP; keeping it would be unused, while Actuator is needed for health checks and metrics.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Mail starter to enable email sending capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Security starter to enable authentication and authorization features.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter to enable bean validation annotations.
Add Flyway Core dependency to manage database migrations.
Add Spring Boot Docker Compose dependency to support local development with Docker services.
Add H2 database driver for in-memory database support, likely for testing or development.
Add PostgreSQL driver to support production relational database connectivity.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities and DTOs.
Replace RabbitMQ test dependency with Spring Security test dependency to align testing with the new security stack.
Configure Spring Boot Maven Plugin to exclude Lombok from the final executable JAR.

src/test/java/br/ufpr/tads/msbantadsauth.general_idea: Add @ActiveProfiles annotation to specify the active Spring profile for tests.
